title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Task 7 halted at final review and re-specced: the combined implementation (writers 394→ doctor/readiness 412 tests) deviated from docs/artifact-contract.md — missing ledger_record_id/source_record_sequence minting, wrong signal reference shape (producer_ref instead of the documented runtime_provenance_ref with producer_ledger_record_id), flattened front-matter aliases instead of the required nested runtime_provenance payload plus runtime_provenance_ledger_record_id, repair-date carrying the old producer instead of minting a new signal generation, and playbook generation members without the shared fingerprint. Root cause: the implementation brief was specced from the plan paraphrase and a code survey without reading the artifact contract; two review findings restating contract clauses were wrongly rejected during arbitration. A full conformance rework against the contract text is running in the Task 7 worktree; lesson persisted to orchestrator memory. Extraction model evaluation completed earlier: Decision 32 recorded and pushed (a45c1be) — meeting-extraction role rises to the claude-implementer tier; pin edit routed to ~/.claude as a work item.
blockers: No corpus adoption or mutation is authorized; a deterministic fingerprinted adoption plan requires later owner approval.
open_questions: Decide when to begin the separately planned Semantic Integrity Guardrails work after the Approved Runtime track.
next_actions: Verify the contract-conformance rework against docs/artifact-contract.md sections directly, rerun independent review, merge Task 7 to the main tree, run the full suite, and commit; then take up Approved Runtime Task 8 (replace ambiguous Claude commands and retire hook-based global refresh) and execute the ~/.claude pin-edit work item from Decision 32 in an agent-orchestration session.
continuation_hint: Next: Verify the contract-conformance rework against docs/artifact-contract.md sections directly, rerun independent review, merge Task 7 to the main tree, run the full suite, and commit; then take up Approved Runtime Task 8 (replace ambiguous Claude commands and retire hook-based global refresh) and execute the ~/.claude pin-edit work item from Decision 32 in an agent-orchestration session.
